title: Mespilus cuneata

intro: Mespilus cuneata, also known as the Chinese hawthorn or May tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Southeast Asia. The health benefits of Mespilus cuneata include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve digestion, and boost the immune system due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, such as ursolic acid and oleanolic acid, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Mespilus cuneata is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, as well as being used to make jams, jellies, and other edible products.
